page_metadata.biotools__summary: PRIORITY is a tool for de novo motif discovery in the context of transcription factor (TF) binding sites. It implements a new approach to motif discovery in which informative priors over sequence positions are used to guide the search.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PRIORITY is a tool for de novo motif discovery in the context of transcription factor (TF) binding sites. It implements a new approach to motif discovery in which informative priors over sequence positions are used to guide the search.
